scenes.description: 女性面部特写，表情专注认真，处于室内柔和光线下，背景模糊，展现专业与决心的氛围。
scenes.video_prompt: A close-up shot of a professional woman with a focused expression, her eyes determined and lips slightly pressed. She wears a dark-colored blouse with neat hair, exuding competence and seriousness. The setting is an indoor environment with soft, even lighting creating a calm yet intense atmosphere. The background is softly blurred, emphasizing her face. Shot with a static camera using a shallow depth of field. Cinematic composition, natural skin tones, warm color grading, 4K resolution, realistic texture.

style_elements.characters: Professional woman, mid-30s, deep-colored top, composed demeanor
style_elements.environment: Indoor, minimalist background, soft ambient light
style_elements.visual_style: Cinematic realism, warm tones, high detail, shallow focus
style_elements.camera_movement: Fixed position, no movement, stable tripod shot

scenes.description: 人物在室内操作或检查电子设备，动作专注，环境简洁，光线均匀，营造出技术性与神秘感并存的氛围。
scenes.video_prompt: A medium shot of the same woman in a dark outfit carefully operating or inspecting a compact electronic device with precise hand movements. The setting is a simple indoor space with plain walls and minimal decoration, lit evenly to highlight her actions. Her facial expression remains focused, maintaining continuity in tone. The atmosphere is professional and slightly mysterious. Camera slowly pushes in slightly to emphasize interaction with the device. Clean visual style, muted colors, soft shadows, 4K UHD, sharp focus on hands and device.

style_elements.characters: Same woman, composed and technical in gesture
style_elements.environment: Minimalist indoor room, neutral walls, functional setup
style_elements.visual_style: Clean, modern, slightly desaturated with soft contrast
style_elements.camera_movement: Slow dolly-in movement toward subject and device
